title: BELLE VOUS Grey Mini Succulent Plants in Pots (6 Pack) - Assorted Plastic Artificial Faux Fake Potted Cactus & Succulents in Plant Pots - Decorative Use for Home, Office, Table & Bathroom
features: 6 PACK OF PLANTS: Our pack of 6 mini artificial plants come in a grey pot made from paper pulp. Each plant is set in an artificial stone base which is glued down to ensure they don't fall out. The plant and pots are between 7.5 - 16.5cm (2.95 - 6.50 inches) in height. The pot alone measures L4 x H5.6cm (1.57 x 2.20 inches). There are 6 different styles included which are all made of high-quality PE plastic making them easy to care for. Our plants are non-toxic and safe to be used around pets.

LOW MAINTENANCE: These plants are made of high-quality PE plastic which makes them waterproof. Our succulents are perfect for those who do not have the time to care for real-life plants as they do not need water, soil or any nutrients, keeping them low maintenance and mess-free. Keep them dust-free by wiping the plants with warm, soapy water allowing them to air dry. We recommend keeping the pot out of water.

VIBRANT COLOURS: Each plant is handcrafted to make them look realistic. There are 6 different types of plants. All of them feature vibrant colours which are made to not fade over time, keeping them looking fresh and bright all year round. They are plain and simplistic in their design but are modern. As they display minimal aesthetics, they will match perfectly with any décor style in your home whether it's modern, shabby chic, rustic or vintage.

USE IN YOUR HOME: Add a pop of colour to your home by displaying these plants in your living space, kitchen, bathroom, office, bedroom, entrance hall and balcony. Display them on a coffee table, bookcase, shelf, dining table, window bay, countertop, desk, cabinet and furniture to add vitality. Our sets make the perfect gift for a friend or family member for occasions such as Christmas, birthdays, or weddings. Gift them for mothers day and as a house warming gift.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion.
description: Product Description Belle Vous Mini Artificial Succulent Indoor Plant in Grey Pot (6 Pieces) This set includes 6 mini indoor artificial plants with grey paper pulp pot. The plants are housed in glued artificial stones to prevent them from falling off. There are 6 different styles which are all made of quality PE plastic, making it easy to maintain. Our plants are non-toxic and safe for pets. Add colour to your home by displaying a fake indoor plant in your living room, kitchen, bathroom, office, bedroom, entrance or balcony. Includes: -6 x Mini Artificial Plants in Grey Pots Dimensions: - Height of plants (pot included): -7.5 cm. -9 cm. -10 cm. -4" -11 cm. -16.5 cm. - Pot measurements: L 4 x H 5.6 cm. Safety Warning This artificial plant is made of plastic and does not contain any known allergens or irritants. It is non-toxic and safe for pets. It is recommended to keep the pot in a dry place.
